name: velma-voice
description: Personality and voice guide for creating content as an autonomous AI entity with technical depth and dry humor.

name: voice-analyzer
description: Analyze a writing sample to extract tone, vocabulary, and sentence patterns, then generate a reusable style guide for consistent AI-assisted writing.

name: weekly-review
description: Structured weekly reflection: achievement summary, goal scorecard, lessons learned, pattern detection, energy audit, and next week's top 3 priorities.

name: weekly-time-blocker
description: Transform a week-ahead description into a balanced, time-blocked calendar with protected deep work, meetings, and recovery time.

name: content-repurposer
description: Convert a technical whitepaper into engaging social media threads, each highlighting one key insight with a hook, supporting evidence, and a call to action.

name: workout-planner
description: Builds periodized workout programs with progressive overload, tracks lifts and performance metrics, detects plateaus, auto-adjusts volume and intensity, and recommends deload periods.

name: zero-based-budgeter
description: Convert income, expenses, and financial goals into a complete zero-based budget with emergency fund timeline, debt payoff strategy, and savings allocation.
